title: Player Pages
text:
Player Analytics Profile
    Start with a player name, or narrow by team, conference, position, and year. Each box is searchable, so typing part of a value will bring the right options forward.

    
      
        Player Search
        
          
          
        
      
      
        Team
        
        
      
      
        Conference
        
        
      
      
        Position / Role
        
        
      
      
        Year
        
        
      
    

    
      
        Matching Players
        
      
      Load Player
    
  

  Select a player to open a profile. The dashboard will compare that player against teammates, conference peers, class year, role group, and the full NCAA pool.

  
    
      
        
        
        
        
      

      
        
          
            Read On The Player
            Executive analytical summary for role, value, translation, and roster decision context.
          
        
        
      

      
        
          
            Comparison Snapshot
            Percentiles update when you change the comparison group.
          
          
        
        
          
          
        
      
    

    
      
        
          
            Production Shape
            Switch the lens to see where the player creates value.
          
          
        
        
      

      
        
          
            Model Outlook
            Transfer probability, likely destination tier, and projected BPM by landing level.
          
          
        
        
        
        
      
    

    
      
        
          
            Team And Rank Context
            Ranks are most useful as role indicators: where the staff already leaned on the player, and where production separated.
          
        
        
      

      
        
          
            Similar Player Neighborhood
            Nearest statistical neighbors from the NCAA pool. Click a player name to open that player page.

title: Projections
text:
Use the buttons below to switch between projection views.

Transfer Likelihood Return / Leave Destination Tier Projected BPM






Hover over a column name for a quick definition. Click a player name to open that player page in this tab, or use the plus button beside a player for projection details.

title: Transfer Portal Projections
text:
This is an extreme rough draft of my transfer portal projections site.
Right now, this site will be used to display player data and projections.
In the future I hope for it to be much more interactive and much easier to understand including: player profile pages with historic data, future predictions, and the reasoning/confidence behind everything. However, as for right now, this primarily acts as a start to build upon and improve upon.
This project is built using publicly available college basketball data scraped from Bart Torvik, with player and team-level metrics such as usage, efficiency (BPM, ORTG), minutes share, and advanced impact stats. From this data, I’ve engineered additional features to capture player role, team context, and performance relative to teammates and within their conference.
The current version of the models use a combination of logistic and regression-based approaches to estimate outcomes such as transfer likelihood, potential destination tier, and projected post-transfer performance. While still in an early stage, the goal is to iteratively build toward a more robust and refined system, continuing to expand the feature set, improve model performance, and push the depth of the analysis even further.

title: Player Table
text:
Filters


Choose at least one filter to load the player table.






Select at least one filter, then apply.



Hover over a column name for a quick definition. Click a player name to open that player page in this tab, or use the plus button beside a player for table-level model details.
